reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content_en: It comes with a little bell, so the babies really love it!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
아이가 반응이 좋지만 털이 너무 날려서 ㅠㅠ그게 아쉬워요.
지금 속이 안좋아서 헛구역질하는데 털이 너무 날리니 더 그럴까봐 조심스럽네요.
reviews.content_en: My pet is responsive to it, but the fur sheds so much ㅠㅠ That's disappointing. My pet isn't feeling well right now and keeps dry heaving, so I'm worried the shedding fur might make it worse.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
슬퍼요..😭
털이 엄청 빠져요ㅠ
첫째가 좋아하는데.. 입에 넣는 순간 털 다 먹을 거 같아 뺏어서 숨겨놨어요.
추천하고 싶지 않은 제품입니다.
reviews.content_en: I'm sad..😭 The fur sheds so much ㅠ My first pet loves it, but the moment it goes in their mouth, it seems like they'll swallow all the fur, so I took it away and hid it. I can't recommend this product.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 털이.. 좀 빠지긴하지만 색이 쨍하고 화려해서그런지 좋아하긴하네여ㅋ
reviews.content_en: The fur does shed a bit, but the colors are so vibrant and flashy that they seem to really like it lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content_en: The moment the pets saw it, they grabbed it and ran away-~~~~

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 고양이는 잘 가지고 노는데 털을 뜯어 먹으려고 해서 잘라줬습니다.
reviews.content_en: My cat plays with it well, but tried to pluck and eat the fur, so I trimmed it for them.

reviews.name: 함****
reviews.content: 반응은 엄청좋은데 털 너무 빠지네요 코에 들어갈듯 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: The response is amazing but the fur sheds so much ㅠㅠ It feels like it might go up their nose

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content_en: I'm playing with them using the hideaway house ᆢㄷ

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 이건 아직 안뜯어봤어요 ㅎㅎ 카샤카샤 다 망가지면 개봉해줄 예정
reviews.content_en: Haven't opened this one yet hehe Once all the crinkly sounds break, I'll unwrap it for them

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content_en:
They're going crazy
They're pulling all the fur out

reviews.name: 슬****
reviews.content:
포장 뜯었는데 만질때마다 털이 빠져서 아쉬웠어요ㅠㅠ
정리하고 줘야할것 같아요ㅠㅠ 고양이는 관심을 많이 보였고 직접 만져보니 늘어나는 꼬리 장난감이라서 재밌는것 같아요
reviews.content_en: I opened the packaging and every time I touched it, fur shed off, which was disappointing ㅠㅠ I'll need to clean it up before giving it to them ㅠㅠ My cat showed a lot of interest, and after touching it myself, I realized it's a stretchy tail toy, so it seems fun!
